title: crispy fizzy indian lentil khichdi
description: a comforting indian dish made with lentils, spices, and elderflower, perfect for post-workout recovery
instructions: heat coconut oil in an iron teppan pan over medium heat
add the onion, ginger, and red chili pepper, and sauté until the onion is translucent
add the cumin, coriander, turmeric powder, salt, and black pepper, and stir for 1 minute
add the lentils, elderflower syrup, and 2 cups of water to the pan
bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes
mash some of the lentils against the side of the pan to break them down and create a creamy consistency
add the frozen spinach to the pan and stir until wilted
reduce heat to low and allow the khichdi to rest, covered, for 10 minutes
serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired
dry the dish in a dehydrator at 135°f for 1 hour to enhance the crispy texture
